notes: Allowlist has two groups: local loopback demo targets and public classroom/lab demo domains.
Only add targets you own, classroom/lab targets intended for testing, or targets you are authorized to scan.
Classroom/demo testing targets included: scanme.nmap.org, pentest-ground.com, demo.testfire.net, and vulnweb.com test domains.
youtube.com is intentionally not allowlisted by default because it is not a lab scanning target. Use --authorized only if you truly have permission.
